import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(df):
    if not df or len(df) == 0:
        raise ValueError("Input DataFrame is empty.")

    numeric_columns = df.select_dtypes(include=['int64', 'float64']).columns

    if len(numeric_columns) == 0:
        raise ValueError("There are no numeric columns in the DataFrame.")

    num_histograms = len(numeric_columns)
    hist_axes = []

    for col in numeric_columns:
        plt.figure()  # Create a new figure to draw each histogram on a separate plot
        ax = plt.gca()  # Get the current Axes object for the plot
        df[col].hist(bins=50)  # Draw the histogram of the column's data
        ax.set_title(col)  # Set the plot title as the column name
        ax.set_xlabel('Value')  # Set the x-axis label
        ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')  # Set the y-axis label
        hist_axes.append(ax)  # Add the Axes object to the list of histograms

    return tuple([hist_axes], num_histograms)
